process_notes: Round 3 targeted re-render covers only the 3 revised reaction clips: nod, look_away, tap.
Expressions and idle are all Approved from prior rounds — not re-rendered.
round_2.json contained a label error: nod diagnosis referenced 'ParamAngleX' but the actual file uses 'ParamAngleY'. The correct fix was applied against the actual file values.
round_2.json proposed nod peak reduction 'from -10 to -7' — but the actual file had peak -22. The correct fix reduces from -22 to -10 (33% of ±30 range).
nod FadeOutTime was already 0.6 in the actual file (exceeding the proposed 0.5). Left unchanged.

changes.rationale: Peak of -22 was 73% of ±30 range — far too deep for a discourse nod. Human review in round 2 noted 'a lot of motion' and head appearing to look down excessively. Reduced to -10 (33% of range), consistent with a natural acknowledgement nod. Secondary rebound keyframe at t=0.9 also scaled proportionally from -8 to -4.

unchanged.note: Already 0.6 s in the actual file — exceeds the round_2 proposed 0.5 s. Left unchanged.

changes.rationale: Increase fade-out duration to soften CubismBreath snap-back at motion end. No keyframe value changes — motion content confirmed correct in round 2 diagnosis.
Increase fade-out duration to soften CubismBreath snap-back at motion end. Jolt and damped oscillation confirmed working correctly in round 2 diagnosis.

meta_counts_note: FadeOutTime changes do not affect CurveCount or TotalSegmentCount. Nod keyframe peak changes are in-place replacements — no segments added or removed. Meta unchanged.

clips.label: REACTION: nod
clips.agent_diagnosis: Human approved in round 3 after fix.

clips.label: REACTION: look_away
clips.agent_diagnosis: Human approved in round 3 after fix.

clips.label: REACTION: tap
clips.agent_diagnosis: Human approved in round 3 after fix.
